feat.name: Ubiquitous Gadgets
feat.special: You can select this feat a second time if you are 14th level or higher.
feat.text: They thought you had used up all your devices, but they thought wrong! You have a few more gadgets up your sleeve than others expect. Increase the number of temporary gadgets you can create each day by 2.

traits.name: Inventor
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the inventor class.
